case_title: MARISA EGERSTROM VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC.,A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EGERSTROM, MARISA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EGERSTROM, MARISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,285.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,490.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
